title: Nostalgia Goggles
body:
**Nostalgia Goggles** is a Programmer Art continuation that strives to replicate the crude-yet-charming quality of Minecraft's older textures, while still being usable for vanilla play. It takes full advantage of textures featured in snapshots, pre-release footage, or unused textures from older versions to give an "authentic" feel.

For a detailed description of the pack's textures, see the [Planet Minecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/nostalgia-goggles/). (I will move this somewhere better in the future.)

Credit to [blank3times](https://modrinth.com/user/blank3times) for the fish buckets (which i have edited) and trapdoor textures from his pack [Programmer Art DX](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-dx).
Credit to [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) for the planks.
